title: Civil Disobedience
description: A Wikisource source card for Henry David Thoreau's essay Civil Disobedience.

pages.text: Civil Disobedience is useful for studying conscience, law, protest, government, and the relationship between individual ethics and public policy.
Use this source for argument analysis and for comparing later movements that referenced or responded to Thoreau.
Wikisource hosts public-domain and freely licensed texts. Check the linked work page for its specific license and source notes before assigning or mirroring.
